<li class="toclevel-1 tocsection-39"><a href="#Monster_3D_Renders"><span class="tocnumber">3</span> <span class="toctext">Monster 3D Renders</span></a></li>
</ul>
</div>

<h2><span class="mw-headline" id="Large_Monsters"><a href="/wiki/Large_Monster" class="mw-redirect" title="Large Monster">Large Monsters</a></span></h2>
<h3><span class="mw-headline" id="Amphibian"><a href="/wiki/Amphibian" title="Amphibian">Amphibian</a></span></h3>
<div style="flex-basis:100%;margin:auto;border-bottom:3px solid lightgray">
<div class="mlistcol" style="justify-content:space-evenly;margin:auto;text-align:center;overflow:hidden;align-items:center">
<div class="left">
<p><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/wiki/Chatacabra" title="Chatacabra"><picture><source srcset="https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/thumb/4/40/MHWA-Chatacabra_Icon.webp/72px-MHWA-Chatacabra_Icon.webp, https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/thumb/4/40/MHWA-Chatacabra_Icon.webp/108px-MHWA-Chatacabra_Icon.webp 1.5x, https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/thumb/4/40/MHWA-Chatacabra_Icon.webp/144px-MHWA-Chatacabra_Icon.webp 2x" /><img src="https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/thumb/4/40/MHWA-Chatacabra_Icon.webp/72px-MHWA-Chatacabra_Icon.webp" decoding="async" width="72" height="72" class="mw-file-element" /></picture></a><a href="https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/4/40/MHWA-Chatacabra_Icon.webp" class="mw-file-source" title="View source image"><!-- Image link for Crawlers --></a></span><br /><a href="/wiki/Chatacabra" title="Chatacabra">Chatacabra</a><br /><span style="font-size:small">チャタカブラ</span><br />Binding Frog<br /><span style="font-size:small"></span>
</p>
</div>
<div class="right">
<p>Amphibians that use their long tongues to seize and devour prey such as Bulaqchi. Their evolved forelimbs store a sticky mucus-like substance. When agitated, Chatacabra rub their forelimbs against the ground to collect stone and ore, widening the range and destructiveness of their blows.<br />Introduced: <a href="/wiki/MHWilds" class="mw-redirect" title="MHWilds">MHWilds</a><br />Latest appearance: <a href="/wiki/MHWilds" class="mw-redirect" title="MHWilds">MHWilds</a><br />Latest spin-off appearance: <a href="/wiki/MHST3" class="mw-redirect" title="MHST3">MHST3</a>
</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div style="flex-basis:100%;margin:auto;border-bottom:3px solid lightgray">
<div class="mlistcol" style="justify-content:space-evenly;margin:auto;text-align:center;overflow:hidden;align-items:center">
<div class="left">
<p><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/wiki/Tetranadon" title="Tetranadon"><picture><source srcset="https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/thumb/e/ef/MHRS-Tetranadon_Icon.png/72px-MHRS-Tetranadon_Icon.png.webp, https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/thumb/e/ef/MHRS-Tetranadon_Icon.png/108px-MHRS-Tetranadon_Icon.png.webp 1.5x, https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/thumb/e/ef/MHRS-Tetranadon_Icon.png/144px-MHRS-Tetranadon_Icon.png.webp 2x" /><img src="https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/thumb/e/ef/MHRS-Tetranadon_Icon.png/72px-MHRS-Tetranadon_Icon.png.webp" decoding="async" width="72" height="72" class="mw-file-element" /></picture></a><a href="https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/e/ef/MHRS-Tetranadon_Icon.png" class="mw-file-source" title="View source image"><!-- Image link for Crawlers --></a></span><br /><a href="/wiki/Tetranadon" title="Tetranadon">Tetranadon</a><br /><span style="font-size:small">ヨツミワドウ</span><br />Kappa Frog<br /><span style="font-size:small"></span>
</p>
</div>
<div class="right">
<p>An amphibious monster resembling a frog. Its appetite is infinite, and if it sees anything moving, it will gobble it up, dirt and all. It's theorized that the dirt it consumes builds up in its stomach and aids in digestion. If it eats something that it cannot digest, it will throw it back up. The cranial disc protecting its tender head is said to harden and become a more brilliant blue over time.<br />Introduced: <a href="/wiki/MHRise" class="mw-redirect" title="MHRise">MHRise</a><br />Latest appearance: <a href="/wiki/MHRS" class="mw-redirect" title="MHRS">MHRS</a><br />Latest spin-off appearance: <a href="/wiki/MHST3" class="mw-redirect" title="MHST3">MHST3</a>
</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div style="flex-basis:100%;margin:auto;border-bottom:3px solid lightgray">
<div class="mlistcol" style="justify-content:space-evenly;margin:auto;text-align:center;overflow:hidden;align-items:center">
<div class="left">
<p><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/wiki/Tetsucabra" title="Tetsucabra"><picture><source srcset="https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/thumb/c/c4/MHGU-Tetsucabra_Icon.png/72px-MHGU-Tetsucabra_Icon.png.webp, https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/thumb/c/c4/MHGU-Tetsucabra_Icon.png/108px-MHGU-Tetsucabra_Icon.png.webp 1.5x, https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/c/c4/MHGU-Tetsucabra_Icon.png 2x" /><img src="https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/thumb/c/c4/MHGU-Tetsucabra_Icon.png/72px-MHGU-Tetsucabra_Icon.png.webp" decoding="async" width="72" height="72" class="mw-file-element" /></picture></a><a href="https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/c/c4/MHGU-Tetsucabra_Icon.png" class="mw-file-source" title="View source image"><!-- Image link for Crawlers --></a></span><br /><a href="/wiki/Tetsucabra" title="Tetsucabra">Tetsucabra</a><br /><span style="font-size:small">テツカブラ</span><br />Oni Frog<br /><span style="font-size:small"></span>
</p>
</div>
<div class="right">
<p>Amphibians with unique jaws and tusks that they use to sift through rocks for prey. They use their powerful hind legs to traverse steep terrain. It can also use the large boulders it digs up to obstruct a predator's vision and make a hasty retreat.<br />Introduced: <a href="/wiki/MH4" class="mw-redirect" title="MH4">MH4</a><br />Latest appearance: <a href="/wiki/MHGU" class="mw-redirect" title="MHGU">MHGU</a><br />Latest spin-off appearance: <a href="/wiki/MHST2" class="mw-redirect" title="MHST2">MHST2</a>
</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div style="flex-basis:100%;margin:auto;border-bottom:3px solid lightgray">
<div class="mlistcol" style="justify-content:space-evenly;margin:auto;text-align:center;overflow:hidden;align-items:center">
<div class="left">
<p><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/wiki/Berserk_Tetsucabra" title="Berserk Tetsucabra"><picture><source srcset="https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/thumb/0/07/MH4U-Berserk_Tetsucabra_Icon.png/72px-MH4U-Berserk_Tetsucabra_Icon.png.webp, https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/thumb/0/07/MH4U-Berserk_Tetsucabra_Icon.png/108px-MH4U-Berserk_Tetsucabra_Icon.png.webp 1.5x, https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/0/07/MH4U-Berserk_Tetsucabra_Icon.png 2x" /><img src="https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/thumb/0/07/MH4U-Berserk_Tetsucabra_Icon.png/72px-MH4U-Berserk_Tetsucabra_Icon.png.webp" decoding="async" width="72" height="72" class="mw-file-element" /></picture></a><a href="https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/0/07/MH4U-Berserk_Tetsucabra_Icon.png" class="mw-file-source" title="View source image"><!-- Image link for Crawlers --></a></span><br /><a href="/wiki/Berserk_Tetsucabra" title="Berserk Tetsucabra">Berserk Tetsucabra</a><br /><span style="font-size:small">テツカブラ亜種</span><br />Rough Oni Frog<br /><span style="font-size:small"></span>
</p>
</div>
<div class="right">
<p>An amphibious monster known for its distinctive markings resembling a painted face. These beasts dig up and hurl boulders in the same way as a standard Tetsucabra does, but the stones thrown by this Berserk variety explode upon impact.<br />Introduced: <a href="/wiki/MH4U" class="mw-redirect" title="MH4U">MH4U</a><br />Latest appearance: <a href="/wiki/MH4U" class="mw-redirect" title="MH4U">MH4U</a><br />
</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div style="flex-basis:100%;margin:auto;border-bottom:3px solid lightgray">
<div class="mlistcol" style="justify-content:space-evenly;margin:auto;text-align:center;overflow:hidden;align-items:center">
<div class="left">
<p><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/wiki/Drilltusk_Tetsucabra" title="Drilltusk Tetsucabra"><picture><source srcset="https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/thumb/0/0e/MHGU-Drilltusk_Tetsucabra_Icon.png/72px-MHGU-Drilltusk_Tetsucabra_Icon.png.webp, https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/thumb/0/0e/MHGU-Drilltusk_Tetsucabra_Icon.png/108px-MHGU-Drilltusk_Tetsucabra_Icon.png.webp 1.5x, https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/0/0e/MHGU-Drilltusk_Tetsucabra_Icon.png 2x" /><img src="https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/thumb/0/0e/MHGU-Drilltusk_Tetsucabra_Icon.png/72px-MHGU-Drilltusk_Tetsucabra_Icon.png.webp" decoding="async" width="72" height="72" class="mw-file-element" /></picture></a><a href="https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/0/0e/MHGU-Drilltusk_Tetsucabra_Icon.png" class="mw-file-source" title="View source image"><!-- Image link for Crawlers --></a></span><br /><a href="/wiki/Drilltusk_Tetsucabra" title="Drilltusk Tetsucabra">Drilltusk Tetsucabra</a><br /><span style="font-size:small">岩穿テツカブラ</span><br />Rock Piercer<br /><span style="font-size:small"></span>
</p>
</div>
<div class="right">
<p>An exceptionally large Tetsucabra with tusks that can drill through earth, or even metal. If the Drilltusk weren't constantly shattering boulders on its enemies or trying to crush them with its weight, one could almost appreciate the masterful way it digs. Requires special permission to hunt.<br />Introduced: <a href="/wiki/MHGen" class="mw-redirect" title="MHGen">MHGen</a><br />Latest appearance: <a href="/wiki/MHGU" class="mw-redirect" title="MHGU">MHGU</a><br />
</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div style="flex-basis:100%;margin:auto;border-bottom:3px solid lightgray">
<div class="mlistcol" style="justify-content:space-evenly;margin:auto;text-align:center;overflow:hidden;align-items:center">
<div class="left">
<p><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/wiki/Zamtrios" title="Zamtrios"><picture><source srcset="https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/thumb/3/39/MHGU-Zamtrios_Icon.png/72px-MHGU-Zamtrios_Icon.png.webp, https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/thumb/3/39/MHGU-Zamtrios_Icon.png/108px-MHGU-Zamtrios_Icon.png.webp 1.5x, https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/3/39/MHGU-Zamtrios_Icon.png 2x" /><img src="https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/thumb/3/39/MHGU-Zamtrios_Icon.png/72px-MHGU-Zamtrios_Icon.png.webp" decoding="async" width="72" height="72" class="mw-file-element" /></picture></a><a href="https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/3/39/MHGU-Zamtrios_Icon.png" class="mw-file-source" title="View source image"><!-- Image link for Crawlers --></a></span><br /><a href="/wiki/Zamtrios" title="Zamtrios">Zamtrios</a><br /><span style="font-size:small">ザボアザギル</span><br />Transforming Shark<br /><span style="font-size:small"></span>
</p>
</div>
<div class="right">
<p>Amphibians that strike from frozen waters, using the cold to stun their prey. They secrete a special liquid that both coats their own body with icy armor and freezes any nearby foes. Frogs are their favorite food.<br />Introduced: <a href="/wiki/MH4" class="mw-redirect" title="MH4">MH4</a><br />Latest appearance: <a href="/wiki/MHGU" class="mw-redirect" title="MHGU">MHGU</a><br />Latest spin-off appearance: <a href="/wiki/MHPuzzles" class="mw-redirect" title="MHPuzzles">MHPuzzles</a>
</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div style="flex-basis:100%;margin:auto;border-bottom:3px solid lightgray">
<div class="mlistcol" style="justify-content:space-evenly;margin:auto;text-align:center;overflow:hidden;align-items:center">
<div class="left">
<p><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/wiki/Tigerstripe_Zamtrios" title="Tigerstripe Zamtrios"><picture><source srcset="https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/thumb/a/a3/MH4U-Tigerstripe_Zamtrios_Icon.png/72px-MH4U-Tigerstripe_Zamtrios_Icon.png.webp, https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/thumb/a/a3/MH4U-Tigerstripe_Zamtrios_Icon.png/108px-MH4U-Tigerstripe_Zamtrios_Icon.png.webp 1.5x, https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/a/a3/MH4U-Tigerstripe_Zamtrios_Icon.png 2x" /><img src="https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/thumb/a/a3/MH4U-Tigerstripe_Zamtrios_Icon.png/72px-MH4U-Tigerstripe_Zamtrios_Icon.png.webp" decoding="async" width="72" height="72" class="mw-file-element" /></picture></a><a href="https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/a/a3/MH4U-Tigerstripe_Zamtrios_Icon.png" class="mw-file-source" title="View source image"><!-- Image link for Crawlers --></a></span><br /><a href="/wiki/Tigerstripe_Zamtrios" title="Tigerstripe Zamtrios">Tigerstripe Zamtrios</a><br /><span style="font-size:small">ザボアザギル亜種</span><br />Tiger Shark<br /><span style="font-size:small"></span>
</p>
</div>
<div class="right">
<p>Unlike its standard counterpart, this distinctively-striped Zamtrios subspecies dwells primarily in desert climes, and can employ its ability to expand and contract its body even while in motion, making it an even more formidable adversary.<br />Introduced: <a href="/wiki/MH4U" class="mw-redirect" title="MH4U">MH4U</a><br />Latest appearance: <a href="/wiki/MH4U" class="mw-redirect" title="MH4U">MH4U</a><br />
</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<h3><span class="mw-headline" id="Bird_Wyvern"><a href="/wiki/Bird_Wyvern" title="Bird Wyvern">Bird Wyvern</a></span></h3>
<div style="flex-basis:100%;margin:auto;border-bottom:3px solid lightgray">
<div class="mlistcol" style="justify-content:space-evenly;margin:auto;text-align:center;overflow:hidden;align-items:center">
<div class="left">
<p><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/wiki/Aknosom" title="Aknosom"><picture><source srcset="https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/thumb/3/37/MHRS-Aknosom_Icon.png/72px-MHRS-Aknosom_Icon.png.webp, https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/thumb/3/37/MHRS-Aknosom_Icon.png/108px-MHRS-Aknosom_Icon.png.webp 1.5x, https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/thumb/3/37/MHRS-Aknosom_Icon.png/144px-MHRS-Aknosom_Icon.png.webp 2x" /><img src="https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/thumb/3/37/MHRS-Aknosom_Icon.png/72px-MHRS-Aknosom_Icon.png.webp" decoding="async" width="72" height="72" class="mw-file-element" /></picture></a><a href="https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/3/37/MHRS-Aknosom_Icon.png" class="mw-file-source" title="View source image"><!-- Image link for Crawlers --></a></span><br /><a href="/wiki/Aknosom" title="Aknosom">Aknosom</a><br /><span style="font-size:small">アケノシルム</span><br />Parasol Bird<br /><span style="font-size:small"></span>
</p>
</div>
<div class="right">
<p>Tending to stand on one leg, this monster somewhat resembles an umbrella. The Aknosom is highly territorial; it will spread out its wings and show off its characteristic comb to scare off threats. It also bears flammable venom that burns fiercely and lingers on the ground when lit. Draw the beast to water for an easier fight.<br />Introduced: <a href="/wiki/MHRise" class="mw-redirect" title="MHRise">MHRise</a><br />Latest appearance: <a href="/wiki/MHRS" class="mw-redirect" title="MHRS">MHRS</a><br />Latest spin-off appearance: <a href="/wiki/MHST3" class="mw-redirect" title="MHST3">MHST3</a>
</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div style="flex-basis:100%;margin:auto;border-bottom:3px solid lightgray">
<div class="mlistcol" style="justify-content:space-evenly;margin:auto;text-align:center;overflow:hidden;align-items:center">
<div class="left">
<p><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/wiki/Gendrome" title="Gendrome"><picture><source srcset="https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/thumb/5/59/MHGU-Gendrome_Icon.png/72px-MHGU-Gendrome_Icon.png.webp, https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/thumb/5/59/MHGU-Gendrome_Icon.png/108px-MHGU-Gendrome_Icon.png.webp 1.5x, https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/5/59/MHGU-Gendrome_Icon.png 2x" /><img src="https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/thumb/5/59/MHGU-Gendrome_Icon.png/72px-MHGU-Gendrome_Icon.png.webp" decoding="async" width="72" height="72" class="mw-file-element" /></picture></a><a href="https://monsterhunterwiki.org/images/5/59/MHGU-Gendrome_Icon.png" class="mw-file-source" title="View source image"><!-- Image link for Crawlers --></a></span><br /><a href="/wiki/Gendrome" title="Gendrome">Gendrome</a><br /><span style="font-size:small">ドスゲネポス</span><br /><br /><span style="font-size:small"></span>
</p>
</div>
<div class="right">
<p>Alpha monsters that lead Genprey packs. Larger than their brothers and with a more prominent crest, Gendrome use the venom in their highly evolved fangs and claws to paralyze their prey.<br />Introduced: <a href="/wiki/MH1" class="mw-redirect" title="MH1">MH1</a><br />Latest appearance: <a href="/wiki/MHGU" class="mw-redirect" title="MHGU">MHGU</a><br />Latest spin-off appearance: <a href="/wiki/MHST2" class="mw-redirect" title="MHST2">MHST2</a>
</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
